quote.text: Every major technology shift creates a massive change management challenge for enterprises.

hero.title: How ZPT Sales Works
hero.description: AI agents that chain multiple steps together autonomously. Source, research, qualify, draft, follow up. Just like a human sales rep would.

stages.title: Find Prospects
stages.description: Source leads from LinkedIn, directories, maps, conferences, and competitor intel.

stages.title: Enrich & Qualify
stages.description: Build full profiles with decision-maker data, company intel, and ICP scoring.

stages.title: Personalized Outreach
stages.description: Draft emails using the company's voice, positioning, and prospect research.

stages.title: Manage Pipeline
stages.description: Track activity, follow-ups, and sync with your existing CRM.

tools.title: Connects to your stack
tools.subtitle: ZPT pulls from and pushes to the tools your company already uses.

enrichment.title: Enrichment templates
enrichment.description: The company provides content and guidelines. ZPT turns that into structured, actionable intelligence.
enrichment.note: Templates are fully customizable. Each client defines their own fields, scoring criteria, and output format.

onboarding.title: 15 min to your first analysis, including onboarding

steps.title: You provide context
steps.description: Company info, ideal customer profile, positioning, and tone of voice.

steps.title: Connect tools or provide a sample list
steps.description: Grant access to your CRM and tools for live data, or simply share a list (e.g. 200 company names) for an initial test.

steps.title: First results within minutes
steps.description: ZPT runs the first enrichment and delivers a fully profiled prospect.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most companies are up and running within 15 minutes. ZPT needs context about the business, the ideal customer profile, and the tools in use. From there, the first enriched prospect profile is generated immediately.

items.question: What tools does ZPT connect to?
items.answer: ZPT integrates with HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Drive, Notion, and Slack. It pulls from and pushes to the tools the company already uses. No migration, no new software.

items.question: How is this different from hiring an SDR?
items.answer: ZPT handles the repetitive parts of the sales process: sourcing, enrichment, outreach drafting, and pipeline management. It runs 24/7 at a fraction of the cost. Human oversight stays in the loop for approvals and relationship building.

items.question: Who approves the outreach before it goes out?
items.answer: The company always approves. ZPT drafts personalized outreach based on prospect research, but nothing gets sent without explicit approval. Full control stays with the team.

items.question: Can ZPT work with our existing CRM data?
items.answer: Yes. ZPT connects to the company's existing CRM and syncs data bidirectionally. Existing contacts, deals, and pipeline stages are preserved and enriched.

items.question: What happens to our data?
items.answer: All data stays under the company's control. ZPT operates on a local folder structure. Nothing is shared, sold, or used for training. The company owns everything.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: A fraction of what a single SDR costs.

hero.title: Your company knows AI is powerful.
hero.subtitle: We make it happen.
hero.description: Every company is experimenting with AI, but few are seeing real results. ZPT sets up a structured, local AI system tailored to your company — for less than one month's employee salary.

tools.title: Connects to your stack
tools.subtitle: ZPT plugs into the tools your company already uses. No migration, no new software.

items.title: 100% company-owned
items.description: The entire system runs on a local folder on your machine. No data leaves your network. No vendor lock-in. The most private AI setup possible.

items.title: Open-source compatible
items.description: Concerned about sharing data with AI labs? Run the system on open-source models (Llama, Mistral, etc.). Same folder, same workflow, full control.

items.title: Built on Claude Code architecture
items.description: The same local folder system used by developers worldwide (CLAUDE.md, skills/, memory/), but purpose-built for business operations instead of code.

items.title: Plugs into what you already use
items.description: Claude in your spreadsheets. Claude in your presentations. Connect to Excel, PowerPoint, Google Drive, Slack, HubSpot, and more. No migration required.

concept.title: Every company is different
paragraphs: ZPT captures culture, roles, processes, and institutional knowledge into a structured local folder. The agent reads this before every task, working like a colleague who's been at the company for years.
Start with a single AI coworker for research, drafting, or data processing. Scale to an entire AI department. Same system, same folder, growing with the business.
The folder stays fully local. No vendor lock-in. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI, open-source models, and others. Switch providers anytime.

agentVisual.caption: The AI provider is interchangeable. The folder stays local and proprietary to the company.
agentVisual.teamNote: Team members can connect via the Claude desktop app and collaborate with the agent directly. Ask questions, give feedback, review output. All from the same interface.

folder.title: The ZPT folder structure
folder.description: Every ZPT deployment runs on top of a structured local folder. This is the foundation: organized, transparent, and fully customizable to match any workflow.
folder.note: The structure above is an example. Every deployment is customized to match the company's actual workflow, tools, and processes.

folders.name: company-context/
folders.label: Context
folders.description: What the business is: overview, product, ICP, positioning

folders.name: account-management/
folders.label: CRM
folders.description: Prospect data and profiles, organized by pipeline stage

folders.name: skills/
folders.label: Standards
folders.description: How output should look: templates, formats, quality rules

folders.name: memory/
folders.label: Memory
folders.description: Lessons learned, preferences, patterns discovered over time

folders.name: output/
folders.label: Deliverables
folders.description: Drafts, content, reports ready for review

folders.name: workflows/
folders.label: Processes
folders.description: How tasks get done: step-by-step procedures

folders.name: CLAUDE.md
folders.label: Instructions
folders.description: Operating instructions for the AI agents

consulting.title: The ZPT SWAT team drops in
consulting.description: ZPT deploys into the organization, sets up the entire system, connects it to existing tools, trains the team, and provides ongoing support.
points: Custom folder structure tailored to the company's workflow
Agent configured with full company context (culture, roles, processes)
Connected to existing tools — Excel, PowerPoint, CRM, drives, messaging
Team trained to work with the agent as a coworker

pricing.title: Advisory tiers
pricing.subtitle: Pricing on request. Every engagement starts with understanding the company's needs.

cta.title: Ready to see what AI can do for your company?

about.title: About ZPT
paragraphs: ZPT believes that the most effective way to use AI agents is by running them on top of a local, structured folder system. Files the company owns, context the company controls, output the company can see and verify.
The approach: connect AI agents to the tools a company already uses, keep data local, and maintain full control over every step of the process.
Today, ZPT operates across three industries: financial analytics, automotive leasing, and logistics. Same system, different context. The product is live and operational.
